name: Employee Onboarding
description: Workflow to onboard new employees including document collection, system access provisioning, and orientation scheduling.
bpmn: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><definitions xmlns="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:activiti="http://activiti.org/bpmn" targetNamespace="http://www.activiti.org/test"><process id="onboarding" name="Employee Onboarding" isExecutable="true"><startEvent id="start" name="Start"/><userTask id="collectDocs" name="Collect Documents" activiti:assignee="${hrManager}"/><userTask id="provisionAccess" name="Provision System Access" activiti:assignee="${itAdmin}"/><endEvent id="end" name="End"/><sequenceFlow id="flow1" sourceRef="start" targetRef="collectDocs"/><sequenceFlow id="flow2" sourceRef="collectDocs" targetRef="provisionAccess"/><sequenceFlow id="flow3" sourceRef="provisionAccess" targetRef="end"/></process></definitions>
